# CASE: nex-case-032-packages-dining-tier-consolidation

> Schema-level completion of the packages consolidation begun in PR #200. Gives the canonical
> `Package` model the full dining-tier shape (tier course min/max, base price, per-package allowed
> menus) and retires the thin `package_modifiers` table. PR #216 OPEN, awaiting Executioner.

- Relationship: completes the packages consolidation started in PR #200 (merged) — #200 removed the
  parallel `TabletPackageConfig`/"Dining Tiers" stack and pointed the admin UI at `Package`; this
  case gives `Package` the dining-tier capabilities that stack used to own.
- Risks / do-not-redo:
  - Migration is **destructive**: `up()` drops `package_modifiers`. `down()` restores the added
    `packages` columns and drops `package_allowed_menus`, but cannot recover dropped
    `package_modifiers` rows. Confirm no production data depends on `package_modifiers` before deploy.
  - `packages.krypton_menu_id` becomes nullable — code paths must not assume it is set.
  - Tablet v2 `packages` payload shape changed; the PWA consumer must be re-verified against the new
    `allowed_menus` structure.

## Tier
3 — destructive schema migration (drops `package_modifiers`, alters `packages`, creates
`package_allowed_menus`) **plus** a change to the tablet/PWA-consumed v2 API contract. Cross-app
contract surface → Tier 3 per the triage rubric.

## Branch
agent/packages-ui-consolidation

## Problem
PR #200 deleted the standalone `TabletPackageConfig` / `TabletPackageAllowedMenu` "Dining Tiers"
stack and made `Package` the single package model. But `Package` itself only had a thin
`package_modifiers` link and no dining-tier shape (no base price, no per-course min/max, no typed
allowed-menu list with pricing/limits). The consolidation was therefore incomplete: the admin UI
pointed at `Package`, but `Package` could not express what the old dining tiers did. This case folds
that capability into `Package` at the schema and API level.

## Success Criterion
- Migration `2026_06_13_203513_consolidate_packages_schema`:
  - drops `package_modifiers`
  - adds to `packages`: `base_price`, `min_meat`/`max_meat`, `min_side`/`max_side`,
    `min_dessert`/`max_dessert`, `min_beverage`/`max_beverage`, `banner_media_id`
  - makes `packages.krypton_menu_id` nullable
  - creates `package_allowed_menus` (`package_id` FK cascade, `krypton_menu_id`, `menu_type`,
    `meat_category_code`, `extra_price`, `quantity_limit`, `is_required`, `is_default`, `is_active`,
    `sort_order`, indexed on `(package_id, menu_type)`)
- `PackageModifier` model removed; `PackageAllowedMenu` model added; `Package` gains the
  `allowedMenus` relation + tier casts/fillable; `PackageFactory` added.
- `PackageController`, `StorePackageRequest`/`UpdatePackageRequest`, `PackageResource`,
  `Packages/Index.vue` updated to the dining-tier shape; `PackageUpdated` event (re-added) busts the
  device package cache.
- Tablet v2 API (`TabletApiController`) returns the consolidated `Package` payload with
  `allowed_menus`; `TabletPackagesApiTest` rewritten; `PackageManagementTest` + `PackageSeeder`
  updated; `routes/web.php` + `ziggy.js` adjusted.
- `php artisan test` green; `npm run build` / `vue-tsc` clean.

## Files Changed
Migration `database/migrations/2026_06_13_203513_consolidate_packages_schema.php`;
models `app/Models/Package.php`, `app/Models/PackageAllowedMenu.php` (new), `app/Models/PackageModifier.php` (deleted);
`database/factories/PackageFactory.php` (new), `database/seeders/PackageSeeder.php`;
event `app/Events/Menu/PackageUpdated.php` (re-added);
controllers/requests/resource `PackageController.php`, `Api/V2/TabletApiController.php`,
`StorePackageRequest.php`, `UpdatePackageRequest.php`, `PackageResource.php`;
frontend `resources/js/pages/Packages/Index.vue`, `resources/js/ziggy.js`, `routes/web.php`;
tests `PackageManagementTest.php`, `Api/V2/TabletPackagesApiTest.php`,
`Api/V1/StagingKryptonOrderDataContractTest.php`, `PrintEventFeatureFlagTest.php`.
(19 files, +964 / −1074.)
